texto: You can do everything right, strictly according to procedure, on the ocean, and it'll still kill you, but if you're a good navigator, at least you'll know where you were when you died.(In "The Nautical Chart" by Arturo Perez-Reverte)
explicacao: Citação de Justin Scott sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You can do everything right, strictly according to procedure, on the ocean, and it'll still kill …” articula reflexao, reality, everything em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
